value.title: Dow Jones Futures: Market At Tipping Point, Here's What To Do. Eli Lilly Soars, Tesla On Tap.
value.summary: Here's what investors should do amid the stock market's divergent signals. Eli Lilly is strong while Tesla EV sales loom.

value.title: Tesla Expands Production In Germany, As VW Cuts 100,000 Jobs
value.summary: Tesla will expand production at its Berlin Gigafactory. Meanwhile, VW plans to close four factories in Germany, according to reports.

value.title: Tesla Stock Is Down This Year, and SpaceX Is Volatile. Are Either Worth Owning Right Now?
value.summary: Tesla and SpaceX remain extraordinary companies, but at current valuations, investors are being asked to pay today for outcomes that are still years away from being proven.
